Hi Jean-Sebastien,

I did an "ldd -a" and it turns out it is GraphicsMagick who depends on gcc's omp library. I recompiled darktable without GraphicsMagick and it is no longer complaining about the omp library, but it still crashes at the same point. I will recompile now with debugging symbols and see where we get.
